# Shri Prasanna Pattnaik Memorial Trust (SPPMT)

> Official website of the Shri Prasanna Pattnaik Memorial Trust, a nonprofit organization established in 2025 in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India.

## About the Trust

The Shri Prasanna Pattnaik Memorial Trust (SPPMT) was established in 2025 to honor and advance the legacy of Shri Prasanna Pattnaik (1948-2025), the first BJP MLA of Odisha. The trust focuses on education, healthcare, agriculture, civic sense, and employment across India, starting from the communities he served in Odisha.

## About the Founder

Shri Prasanna Pattnaik (1 June 1948 - 30 May 2025) was a social worker, MISA detainee, and three-time MLA from Kamakhyanagar, Dhenkanal, Odisha. He was the first BJP MLA elected to the Odisha Legislative Assembly in 1985. He dedicated his life to founding schools, colleges, healthcare centres, a blood bank, and building bridges across Dhenkanal district, Odisha.

## Key Facts

- Full name: Shri Prasanna Pattnaik Memorial Trust
- Abbreviation: SPPMT
- Website: https://sppmt.org
- Established: 2025
- Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India
- Email: prasannapattnaiktrust@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 9439725460, +91 9178256179
- Instagram: @prasannapattnaiktrust

## Focus Areas

1. Education: Scholarships, school infrastructure, e-libraries, vocational training
2. Healthcare: Health camps, blood donation drives, maternal care, rural health
3. Agriculture: Sustainable farming, crop diversification, farmer training
4. Civic Sense: Environmental awareness, community hygiene, youth engagement
5. Employment: Vocational training, skill development, women empowerment

- / — Home

- /about — About the Trust (mission, vision, board of trustees)
- /programs — Our Programs (education, healthcare, agriculture, civic sense, employment)
- /gallery — Photo Gallery
